arts.ttl: Arsenal full squad vs Shakhtar in Champions League revealed as Ethan Nwaneri role 'confirmed'
arts.sum: The likes of Kai Havertz, Gabriel Martinelli and Thomas Partey all overcame minor knocks to feature in the clash at Vitality Stadium with Ben White, ruled out because of a groin issue, making his first start in four weeks. However, Bukayo Saka and Jurrien Timber joined captain Martin Odegaard as marquee absentees through injury.

arts.ttl: Chelsea ask about £60m star who previously snubbed Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea have reportedly asked for information on the situation of Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic as they continue to keep an eye out for potential signings up front. The Blues have shown an interest in Vlahovic, who is valued at around £60m by Juve, though it’s seemingly felt that the Serbia international is happy at his […] The post Chelsea ask about £60m star who previously snubbed Arsenal transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal receive Nico Williams transfer boost as 'bid submitted' to put Mikel Arteta on red alert - Kieran Horn
arts.sum: football.london says: "Such a sacrifice needing to be made makes it highly unlikely that Madrid acquire Williams' signature. Talents for the future have also been eyed by Arsenal with one of those at the centre of a huge transfer battle that Atletico Madrid are currently winning.

arts.ttl: Saliba, Nwaneri and Saka calls made ahead of Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk
arts.sum: Canton’s Arsenal XI: Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Zinchenko; Rice, Merino, Nwaneri; Jesus, Havertz, Martinelli Kaynak's Arsenal XI vs Shakhtar Donetsk - Raya; White, Saliba, Gabriel, Zinchenko; Sterling, Rice, Jorginho, Jesus; Havertz, Trossard.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals genius plan to solve Arsenal discipline problem as red cards mount up
arts.sum: No side has won the Premier League after receiving so many red cards since Leicester in 2016, and speaking ahead of Tuesday night's Champions League clash with Shakhtar Donetsk, Arteta reaffirmed the urgency with which Arsenal have to overcome their disciplinary problems. In his first two and a half seasons at the club, the Gunners received a whopping 16 red cards, before having just two players sent off in the entirety of the following two campaigns.

arts.ttl: What channel is Arsenal vs Shakhtar on with TNT not showing Champions League clash?
arts.sum: Arsenal will look to raise their knocked spirits in the Champions League, but some viewers may have some trouble looking for the right channel to watch the game

arts.ttl: Premier League supercomputer predicts final table - and it's bad news for Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool look to be among the main contenders for the Premier League title this season and a new supercomputer has predicted who will lift the trophy

arts.ttl: Arsenal guaranteed to be without five players for Shakhtar as Saka and Timber 'decision made'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is still dealing with numerous Arsenal injury worries ahead of the Champions League clash against Shakhtar Donetsk - despite four players overcoming fitness concerns to play against Bournemouth. Bukayo Saka and Jurrien Timber missed the clash because of injury, despite Arteta's hopeful update before the defeat at Vitality Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Arsenal will be aiming to bounce back from their first defeat of the season at the weekend when they host Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Tuesday evening. The Gunners fell to a disappointing 2-0 loss at Bournemouth as William Saliba was sent off in the first half - the third red card Arsenal have received in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta problems stack up as Gary Neville cautions against excuse
arts.sum: Arsenal are preparing for two games this week but will be without several of their leading lights as Gary Neville claimed their injury list cannot be used as an excuse
